electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 25 Hz - 100 Hz (low frequency limit 25 Hz at -10 dB; upper limit set by preset to 60 Hz or 100 Hz)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 143 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4, [KS28_100] preset
electroacoustic.directivity: Selectable standard (omnidirectional) or cardioid, set by physical arrangement plus matching preset
electroacoustic.components: 2 x 18-inch neodymium direct-radiating transducers with aluminium die-cast baskets, bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents laminar-vented ports

amplification.preset_note: Each enclosure uses one amplifier output channel (one SB signal channel). LA12X drives up to 4 KS28 (one per output). LA2Xi drives 4 in SE mode or 1 in PBTL bridged mode. Standard presets (_60/_100) and cardioid presets (_C/_Cx) each set the upper limit to 60 Hz or 100 Hz for coupling with the main system.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) input; pinout 1+/1- carry the LF transducers (2+/2- not linked)
connection.breakouts: Compatible with SP-Y1 (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON via CC4FP adapter) and DOSUB-LA8 breakout (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON, or to 1x 4-point + 2x 2-point speakON)

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade beech and birch plywood with internal stiffeners; steel front grille with anti-corrosion coating and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; dark grey brown PANTONE 426 C finish

modes: Ground-stacked (horizontal or vertical, upright or on-end, in blocks)
Flown in vertical arrays using KS28-BUMP
Cardioid arrangement (block of 4, one element reversed)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: 16 x KS28 (with KS28-BUMP); enclosure safety label also rates 16 KS28
rigging_accessories: KS28-BUMP (lifting/flying beam for up to 16 KS28)
LA-SLING2T (2-leg lifting chain, 8 mm, DIN EN 818-4)
Flush-fitting 2-point rigging system integrated in cabinet
2 ground runners with top tracks for stacking
8 L-shaped side runners for upright stacking
KS28-PLA front dolly, KS28-CHARIOT (up to 4 units), KS28-COV / KS28-CHARIOTCOV covers
deployment.grouping_note: Keep enclosures side by side; if not possible, max distance between adjacent acoustic centers is 2.8 m at 60 Hz upper limit or 1.7 m at 100 Hz upper limit. Verify any non-standard array mechanically in Soundvision.

usage: Reference high-output subwoofer for extending the low end of large-format L-Acoustics line source systems (e.g. K-series) in touring and large installs.
Each KS28 needs one amplifier output: budget one LA12X or LA2Xi (SE mode) per four cabinets, or run a single cabinet bridged on LA2Xi PBTL when maximum headroom per box is wanted.
Pick the _60 preset family when crossing low to the mains and _100 when more sub bandwidth is needed; both keep the -10 dB point at 25 Hz.
For directional bass, deploy in cardioid blocks of four with one reversed cabinet and load the _C or _Cx preset on the reversed unit to reject rear-stage SPL.
Place cabinets directly side by side for proper coupling; if gaps are unavoidable, respect the 2.8 m (60 Hz) or 1.7 m (100 Hz) max acoustic-center spacing.
Fly up to 16 units on KS28-BUMP or ground-stack horizontally/vertically; always validate non-standard flown or stacked arrays in Soundvision before rigging.
